revision.text:
<!--content taken from https://shinto.miraheze.org/wiki/Amanoiwato_Shrine_(Fukuchiyama)?action=edit&section=1--> The Fukuchiyama Moto-Ise complex is a Shrine complex consisting of three different shrines. Two of them are [[Moto-Ise Shrines]] for {{ill|Kōtai Jingu|ja|皇大神宮}} and {{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮}} respectively and one is a core cave. Possibly the amanoiwato shrine but I am not sure. == Overview == The shrine is one of the {{ill|Moto-Ise Shrines|ja|元伊勢}} located in the Ōe area of the city (details at {{ill|Kōtai Jingu Shrine (Fukuchiyama)|ja|皇大神社}}). Amanoiwato Shrine is considered the inner shrine of Kōtai Jingu Shrine.
{|class="wikitable" |- ! colspan="3" | Moto-Ise Shrines in Ōe, Fukuchiyama |- |'''{{ill|Kōtai Jingu Shrine (Fukuchiyama)|ja|皇大神社|lt=Kōtai Jingu Shrine}}''' |Ōe-chō, Uchimiya, Fukuchiyama |Origin of {{ill|Kōtai Jingu|ja|皇大神宮}} (Inner Shrine of Ise Grand Shrine) |- |'''{{ill|Toyo'uke Daijingu Shrine|ja|豊受大神社}}''' |Ōe-chō, Amatauchi, Fukuchiyama |Origin of {{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮}} (Outer Shrine of Ise Grand Shrine) |- |'''{{ill|Amanoiwato_Shrine_(Fukuchiyama)|lt=Amanoiwato Shrine|ja|天岩戸神社_(福知山市)}}''' |Ōe-chō, Butsushōji, Fukuchiyama |Inner shrine of Kōtai Jingu Shrine |} [[Category:Moto-Ise Shrines]]

<!--content taken from https://shinto.miraheze.org/wiki/Amanoiwato_Shrine_(Fukuchiyama)?action=edit&section=1--> The Fukuchiyama Moto-Ise complex is a Shrine complex consisting of three different shrines. Two of them are [[Moto-Ise Shrines]] for {{ill|Kōtai Jingu|ja|皇大神宮}} and {{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮}} respectively and one is a core cave. Possibly the amanoiwato shrine but I am not sure. == Overview == The shrine is one of the {{ill|Moto-Ise Shrines|ja|元伊勢}} located in the Ōe area of the city (details at {{ill|Kōtai Jingu Shrine (Fukuchiyama)|ja|皇大神社}}). Amanoiwato Shrine is considered the inner shrine of Kōtai Jingu Shrine.
{|class="wikitable" |- ! colspan="3" | Moto-Ise Shrines in Ōe, Fukuchiyama |- |'''{{ill|Kōtaijinja (Fukuchiyama)|ja|皇大神社 (福知山市)}}''' |Ōe-chō, Uchimiya, Fukuchiyama |Origin of {{ill|Kōtai Jingu|ja|皇大神宮}} (Inner Shrine of Ise Grand Shrine) |- |'''{{ill|Toyo'uke Daijingu Shrine|ja|豊受大神社}}''' |Ōe-chō, Amatauchi, Fukuchiyama |Origin of {{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮}} (Outer Shrine of Ise Grand Shrine) |- |'''{{ill|Amanoiwato_Shrine_(Fukuchiyama)|lt=Amanoiwato Shrine|ja|天岩戸神社_(福知山市)}}''' |Ōe-chō, Butsushōji, Fukuchiyama |Inner shrine of Kōtai Jingu Shrine |} [[Category:Moto-Ise Shrines]]

<!--content taken from https://shinto.miraheze.org/wiki/Amanoiwato_Shrine_(Fukuchiyama)?action=edit&section=1--> The Fukuchiyama Moto-Ise complex is a Shrine complex consisting of three different shrines. Two of them are [[Moto-Ise Shrines]] for {{ill|Kōtai Jingu|ja|皇大神宮}} and {{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮}} respectively and one is a core cave. Possibly the amanoiwato shrine but I am not sure. == Overview == The shrine is one of the {{ill|Moto-Ise Shrines|ja|元伊勢}} located in the Ōe area of the city (details at {{ill|Kōtai Jingu Shrine (Fukuchiyama)|ja|皇大神社}}). Amanoiwato Shrine is considered the inner shrine of Kōtai Jingu Shrine.
{|class="wikitable" |- ! colspan="3" | Moto-Ise Shrines in Ōe, Fukuchiyama |- |'''{{ill|Kotai Shrine|ja|皇大神社 (福知山市)}}''' |Ōe-chō, Uchimiya, Fukuchiyama |Origin of {{ill|Kōtai Jingu|ja|皇大神宮}} (Inner Shrine of Ise Grand Shrine) |- |'''{{ill|Toyo'uke Daijingu Shrine|ja|豊受大神社}}''' |Ōe-chō, Amatauchi, Fukuchiyama |Origin of {{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮}} (Outer Shrine of Ise Grand Shrine) |- |'''{{ill|Amanoiwato_Shrine_(Fukuchiyama)|lt=Amanoiwato Shrine|ja|天岩戸神社_(福知山市)}}''' |Ōe-chō, Butsushōji, Fukuchiyama |Inner shrine of Kōtai Jingu Shrine |} [[Category:Moto-Ise Shrines]]

<!--content taken from https://shinto.miraheze.org/wiki/Amanoiwato_Shrine_(Fukuchiyama)?action=edit&section=1--> The Fukuchiyama Moto-Ise complex is a Shrine complex consisting of three different shrines. Two of them are [[Moto-Ise Shrines]] for {{ill|Kōtai Jingu|ja|皇大神宮}} and {{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮}} respectively and one is a core cave. Possibly the amanoiwato shrine but I am not sure. == Overview == The shrine is one of the {{ill|Moto-Ise Shrines|ja|元伊勢}} located in the Ōe area of the city (details at {{ill|Kōtai Jingu Shrine (Fukuchiyama)|ja|皇大神社}}). Amanoiwato Shrine is considered the inner shrine of Kōtai Jingu Shrine.

<!--content taken from https://shinto.miraheze.org/wiki/Amanoiwato_Shrine_(Fukuchiyama)?action=edit&section=1--> The Fukuchiyama Moto-Ise complex is a Shrine complex consisting of three different shrines. revision.text:
The Fukuchiyama Moto-Ise complex is a Shrine complex consisting of three different shrines. Two of them are [[Moto-Ise Shrines]] for {{ill|Kōtai Jingū|ja|皇大神宮|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|qq=}} and {{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyouke Daijingu|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyouke Daijingu|qq=}} respectively and one is a core cave. Possibly the amanoiwato shrine but I am not sure. == Overview == The shrine is one of the {{ill|Moto-Ise Shrines|ja|元伊勢|1=Moto-Ise Shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moto-Ise Shrines|13=User:Immanuelle/Moto-Ise Shrines|qq=}} located in the Ōe area of the city (details at '''{{ill|Kōtai Shrine|lt=Kōtai Shrine|lt=Kotai Shrine|ja|皇大神社 (福知山市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotai Shrine|qq=}}'''). Amanoiwato Shrine is considered the inner shrine of Kōtai Jingu Shrine.
{|class="wikitable" |- ! colspan="3" | {{ill|Three Moto-Ise Shrines of Fukuchiyama|ja|元伊勢三社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Moto-Ise Shrines of Fukuchiyama|qq=}} |- |'''{{ill|Kōtai Shrine|lt=Kōtai Shrine|lt=Kotai Shrine|ja|皇大神社 (福知山市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotai Shrine|qq=}}''' |Ōe-chō, Uchimiya, Fukuchiyama |Origin of {{ill|Kōtai Jingū|ja|皇大神宮|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|qq=}} (Inner Shrine of Ise Grand Shrine) |- |'''{{ill|Toyouke Shrine (Fukuchiyama)|ja|豊受大神社|lt=Toyouke Daijinja|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyouke Shrine (Fukuchiyama)|qq=}}''' |Ōe-chō, Amatauchi, Fukuchiyama |Origin of {{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyouke Daijingu|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyouke Daijingu|qq=}} (Outer Shrine of Ise Grand Shrine) |- |'''{{ill|Amanoiwato_Shrine_(Fukuchiyama)|lt=Amanoiwato Shrine|ja|天岩戸神社_(福知山市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanoiwato_Shrine_(Fukuchiyama)|qq=}}''' |Ōe-chō, Butsushōji, Fukuchiyama |Inner shrine of Kōtai Jingu Shrine |}

The Fukuchiyama Moto-Ise complex is a Shrine complex consisting of three different shrines. Two of them are [[Moto-Ise Shrines]] for {{ill|Kōtai Jingū|ja|皇大神宮|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} and {{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyouke Daijingu|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyouke Daijingu|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} respectively and one is a core cave. Possibly the amanoiwato shrine but I am not sure. == Overview == The shrine is one of the {{ill|Moto-Ise Shrines|ja|元伊勢|1=Moto-Ise Shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moto-Ise Shrines|13=User:Immanuelle/Moto-Ise Shrines|qq=}} located in the Ōe area of the city (details at '''{{ill|Kōtai Shrine|lt=Kōtai Shrine|lt=Kotai Shrine|ja|皇大神社 (福知山市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotai Shrine|qq=}}'''). Amanoiwato Shrine is considered the inner shrine of Kōtai Jingu Shrine.
{|class="wikitable" |- ! colspan="3" | {{ill|Three Moto-Ise Shrines of Fukuchiyama|ja|元伊勢三社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Moto-Ise Shrines of Fukuchiyama|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |- |'''{{ill|Kōtai Shrine|lt=Kōtai Shrine|lt=Kotai Shrine|ja|皇大神社 (福知山市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotai Shrine|qq=}}''' |Ōe-chō, Uchimiya, Fukuchiyama |Origin of {{ill|Kōtai Jingū|ja|皇大神宮|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (Inner Shrine of Ise Grand Shrine) |- |'''{{ill|Toyouke Shrine (Fukuchiyama)|ja|豊受大神社|lt=Toyouke Daijinja|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyouke Shrine (Fukuchiyama)|qq=}}''' |Ōe-chō, Amatauchi, Fukuchiyama |Origin of {{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyouke Daijingu|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyouke Daijingu|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (Outer Shrine of Ise Grand Shrine) |- |'''{{ill|Amanoiwato_Shrine_(Fukuchiyama)|lt=Amanoiwato Shrine|ja|天岩戸神社_(福知山市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanoiwato_Shrine_(Fukuchiyama)|qq=}}''' |Ōe-chō, Butsushōji, Fukuchiyama |Inner shrine of Kōtai Jingu Shrine |}

The Fukuchiyama Moto-Ise complex is a Shrine complex consisting of three different shrines. revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[sn:commons:Category:Three Moto-Ise Shrines of Fukuchiyama]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:30, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:57, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=might be good to merge all of these into one article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:58, 21 May 2025 (UTC)}}
The Fukuchiyama Moto-Ise complex is a Shrine complex consisting of three different shrines. Two of them are [[Moto-Ise Shrines]] for {{ill|Kōtai Jingū|ja|皇大神宮|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} and {{ill|Toyōke Daijingū|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyōke Daijingū|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} respectively and one is a core cave. Possibly the amanoiwato shrine but I am not sure. == Overview == The shrine is one of the {{ill|Moto-Ise Shrines|ja|元伊勢|1=Moto-Ise Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moto-Ise Shrines|13=User:Immanuelle/Moto-Ise Shrines|qq=}} located in the Ōe area of the city (details at '''{{ill|Kōtai Shrine|lt=Kōtai Shrine|lt=Kotai Shrine|ja|皇大神社 (福知山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotai Shrine|qq=}}'''). Amanoiwato Shrine is considered the inner shrine of Kōtai Jingu Shrine.
{|class="wikitable" |- ! colspan="3" | {{ill|Three Moto-Ise Shrines of Fukuchiyama|ja|元伊勢三社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Moto-Ise Shrines of Fukuchiyama|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |- |'''{{ill|Kōtai Shrine|lt=Kōtai Shrine|lt=Kotai Shrine|ja|皇大神社 (福知山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotai Shrine|qq=}}''' |Ōe-chō, Uchimiya, Fukuchiyama |Origin of {{ill|Kōtai Jingū|ja|皇大神宮|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (Inner Shrine of Ise Grand Shrine) |- |'''{{ill|Toyouke Shrine (Fukuchiyama)|ja|豊受大神社|lt=Toyouke Daijinja|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyouke Shrine (Fukuchiyama)|qq=}}''' |Ōe-chō, Amatauchi, Fukuchiyama |Origin of {{ill|Toyōke Daijingū|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyōke Daijingū|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (Outer Shrine of Ise Grand Shrine) |- |'''{{ill|Amanoiwato_Shrine_(Fukuchiyama)|lt=Amanoiwato Shrine|ja|天岩戸神社_(福知山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanoiwato_Shrine_(Fukuchiyama)|qq=}}''' |Ōe-chō, Butsushōji, Fukuchiyama |Inner shrine of Kōtai Jingu Shrine |}

The Fukuchiyama Moto-Ise complex is a Shrine complex consisting of three different shrines. Two of them are [[Moto-Ise Shrines]] for {{ill|Kōtai Jingū|ja|皇大神宮|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} and {{ill|Toyōke Daijingū|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyōke Daijingū|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} respectively and one is a core cave. Possibly the amanoiwato shrine but I am not sure. == Overview == The shrine is one of the {{ill|Moto-Ise Shrines|ja|元伊勢|1=Moto-Ise Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moto-Ise Shrines|13=User:Immanuelle/Moto-Ise Shrines|qq=}} located in the Ōe area of the city (details at '''{{ill|Kōtai Shrine|lt=Kōtai Shrine|lt=Kotai Shrine|ja|皇大神社 (福知山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotai Shrine|qq=}}'''). Amanoiwato Shrine is considered the inner shrine of Kōtai Jingu Shrine.
{|class="wikitable" |- ! colspan="3" | {{ill|Three Moto-Ise Shrines of Fukuchiyama|ja|元伊勢三社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Moto-Ise Shrines of Fukuchiyama|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |- |'''{{ill|Kōtai Shrine|lt=Kōtai Shrine|lt=Kotai Shrine|ja|皇大神社 (福知山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotai Shrine|qq=}}''' |Ōe-chō, Uchimiya, Fukuchiyama |Origin of {{ill|Kōtai Jingū|ja|皇大神宮|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (Inner Shrine of Ise Grand Shrine) |- |'''{{ill|Toyouke Shrine (Fukuchiyama)|ja|豊受大神社|lt=Toyouke Daijinja|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyouke Shrine (Fukuchiyama)|qq=}}''' |Ōe-chō, Amatauchi, Fukuchiyama |Origin of {{ill|Toyōke Daijingū|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyōke Daijingū|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (Outer Shrine of Ise Grand Shrine) |- |'''{{ill|Amanoiwato_Shrine_(Fukuchiyama)|lt=Amanoiwato Shrine|ja|天岩戸神社_(福知山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanoiwato_Shrine_(Fukuchiyama)|qq=}}''' |Ōe-chō, Butsushōji, Fukuchiyama |Inner shrine of Kōtai Jingu Shrine |}

Two of them are [[Moto-Ise Shrines]] for {{ill|Kōtai Jingū|ja|皇大神宮|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} and {{ill|Toyōke Daijingū|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyōke Daijingū|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} respectively and one is a core cave. Possibly the amanoiwato shrine but I am not sure. == Overview == The shrine is one of the {{ill|Moto-Ise Shrines|ja|元伊勢|1=Moto-Ise Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moto-Ise Shrines|13=User:Immanuelle/Moto-Ise Shrines|qq=}} located in the Ōe area of the city (details at '''{{ill|Kōtai Shrine|lt=Kōtai Shrine|lt=Kotai Shrine|ja|皇大神社 (福知山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotai Shrine|qq=}}'''). Amanoiwato Shrine is considered the inner shrine of Kōtai Jingu Shrine.

Two of them are [[Moto-Ise Shrines]] for {{ill|Kōtai Jingū|ja|皇大神宮|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} and {{ill|Toyōke Daijingū|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyōke Daijingū|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} respectively and one is a core cave. Possibly the amanoiwato shrine but I am not sure. == Overview == The shrine is one of the {{ill|Moto-Ise Shrines|ja|元伊勢|1=Moto-Ise Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moto-Ise Shrines|13=User:Immanuelle/Moto-Ise Shrines|qq=}} located in the Ōe area of the city (details at '''{{ill|Kōtai Shrine|lt=Kōtai Shrine|lt=Kotai Shrine|ja|皇大神社 (福知山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotai Shrine|qq=}}'''). Amanoiwato Shrine is considered the inner shrine of Kōtai Jingu Shrine.
